prompt: Run a full visual regression test on all pages of EAGLE and upload the results to S3 so we can see them in the dashboard.

assertions.text: Uses --journeys all to cover all pages
Explicitly mentions /admin/e2e-judge as the dashboard page for viewing results
Lists all available journeys (login, home, chat, admin, documents, responsive)
Mentions approximate screenshot count and cost for a full run
Uses the correct internal ALB URL (internal-eaglec-front-teerfwosqs71)
Mentions the chat journey's enhanced screenshot strategy (pre-send + 30s intervals)
